header.description: Con(Due to limitations with Rule Elements, you must edit the Bulk Capacity and Bulk Ignored settings manually on the Details page)

labels.text: The Bulk of items inside the container does not count towards your carried weight
The capacity of the container increases by 20 bulk, up to a maximum capacity of 25 bulk
The capacity of the container increases by a total of 45 bulk, up to a maximum capacity of 50 bulk
The capacity of the container increases by a total of 95 bulk, up to a maximum capacity of 100 bulk
The capacity of the container increases by a total of 145 bulk, up to a maximum capacity of 150 bulk
